summary: AES-256 Encryption of Patient Data Test Case
description: This test case validates that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 as per the system requirements.
objective: To verify that the system encrypts patient data using AES-256 encryption algorithm.
prerequisites: The system has been configured to use AES-256 encryption for patient data
A sample patient record with sensitive information is available
test_steps: Step 1: Create a new patient record with sensitive information (e.g. name, address, medical history)
Step 2: Encrypt the patient record using the system's AES-256 encryption algorithm
Step 3: Verify that the encrypted data is stored in the system's database
expected_result: The patient data should be successfully encrypted using AES-256 and stored in the system's database.
acceptance_criteria: The encrypted data should be in a format that is unreadable without the decryption key
The system should be able to decrypt the patient data using the same AES-256 encryption algorithm
